'''jazhaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gradoo|gradoo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gradoo|gradoo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jazhaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæzhægæth|jæzhægæth]] || [[word:jæzhægæj|jæzhægæj]] || [[word:jæzhægæsh|jæzhægæsh]] || [[word:jæzhægæ|jæzhægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhazhagath|jazhazhagath]] || [[word:jazhazhagaj|jazhazhagaj]] || [[word:jazhazhagash|jazhazhagash]] || [[word:jazhazhaga|jazhazhaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhagath|jazhagath]] || [[word:jazhagaj|jazhagaj]] || [[word:jazhagash|jazhagash]] || [[word:jazhaga|jazhaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhafgath|jazhafgath]] || [[word:jazhafgaj|jazhafgaj]] || [[word:jazhafgash|jazhafgash]] || [[word:jazhafgaf|jazhafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jazhagatha|jazhagatha]] || [[word:jazhagaja|jazhagaja]] || [[word:jazhagasha|jazhagasha]] || [[word:jazhagaka|jazhagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jazhagath|jazhagath]] || [[word:jazhagaj|jazhagaj]] || [[word:jazhagash|jazhagash]] || [[word:jazhaga|jazhaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jazhagathal|jazhagathal]] || [[word:jazhagajal|jazhagajal]] || [[word:jazhagashal|jazhagashal]] || [[word:jazhagakal|jazhagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jazhagathatha|jazhagathatha]] || [[word:jazhagajaja|jazhagajaja]] || [[word:jazhagashasha|jazhagashasha]] || [[word:jazhagaka|jazhagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jazhagathan|jazhagathan]] || [[word:jazhagajan|jazhagajan]] || [[word:jazhagashan|jazhagashan]] || [[word:jazhagakan|jazhagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jazhagathaoro|jazhagathaoro]] || [[word:jazhagajaoro|jazhagajaoro]] || [[word:jazhagashaoro|jazhagashaoro]] || [[word:jazhagakaoro|jazhagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
